'''hovavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubilar|jubilar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubilar|jubilar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hovavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovavithi|hovavithi]] || [[word:hovaviji|hovaviji]] || [[word:hovavishi|hovavishi]] || [[word:hovaviki|hovaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovavuthuthu|hovavuthuthu]] || [[word:hovavujuju|hovavujuju]] || [[word:hovavushushu|hovavushushu]] || [[word:hovavukuku|hovavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovavuthu|hovavuthu]] || [[word:hovavuju|hovavuju]] || [[word:hovavushu|hovavushu]] || [[word:hovavuku|hovavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovavufthuf|hovavufthuf]] || [[word:hovavufjuf|hovavufjuf]] || [[word:hovavufshuf|hovavufshuf]] || [[word:hovavufkuf|hovavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovavethe|hovavethe]] || [[word:hovaveje|hovaveje]] || [[word:hovaveshe|hovaveshe]] || [[word:hovaveke|hovaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovavothotho|hovavothotho]] || [[word:hovavojojo|hovavojojo]] || [[word:hovavoshosho|hovavoshosho]] || [[word:hovavokoko|hovavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovavotho|hovavotho]] || [[word:hovavojo|hovavojo]] || [[word:hovavosho|hovavosho]] || [[word:hovavoko|hovavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovavofthof|hovavofthof]] || [[word:hovavofjof|hovavofjof]] || [[word:hovavofshof|hovavofshof]] || [[word:hovavofkof|hovavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfthÃŸf|hovavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfjÃŸf|hovavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfshÃŸf|hovavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfkÃŸf|hovavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hovavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hovavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hovavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hovavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfthÃŸf|hovavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfjÃŸf|hovavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfshÃŸf|hovavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfkÃŸf|hovavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfthÃŸf|hovavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfjÃŸf|hovavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfshÃŸf|hovavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hovavÃŸfkÃŸf|hovavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hovavÃḊthÃḊ|hovavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hovavÃḊjÃḊ|hovavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hovavÃḊshÃḊ|hovavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hovavÃḊkÃḊ|hovavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hovavathatha|hovavathatha]] || [[word:hovavajaja|hovavajaja]] || [[word:hovavashasha|hovavashasha]] || [[word:hovavakaka|hovavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hovavatha|hovavatha]] || [[word:hovavaja|hovavaja]] || [[word:hovavasha|hovavasha]] || [[word:hovavaka|hovavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hovavafthaf|hovavafthaf]] || [[word:hovavafjaf|hovavafjaf]] || [[word:hovavafshaf|hovavafshaf]] || [[word:hovavafkaf|hovavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hovavasha|hovavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovavshÃḋsha|hovavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovavrosha|hovavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovavmusha|hovavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovavyasha|hovavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovavnkshÃḋsha|gohovavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovavnkrosha|gohovavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovavnkmusha|gohovavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovavnkyasha|gohovavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hovavavasha|hovavavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovavavshÃḋsha|hovavavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovavavrosha|hovavavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovavavmusha|hovavavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovavavyasha|hovavavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovavavnkshÃḋsha|gohovavavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovavavnkrosha|gohovavavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovavavnkmusha|gohovavavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovavavnkyasha|gohovavavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hevÃḊvasha|hevÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hevÃḊvshÃḋsha|hevÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hevÃḊvrosha|hevÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hevÃḊvmusha|hevÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hevÃḊvyasha|hevÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohevÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gohevÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohevÃḊvnkrosha|gohevÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohevÃḊvnkmusha|gohevÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohevÃḊvnkyasha|gohevÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hovfavasha|hovfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hovfavshÃḋsha|hovfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hovfavrosha|hovfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hovfavmusha|hovfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hovfavyasha|hovfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohovfavnkshÃḋsha|gohovfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohovfavnkrosha|gohovfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohovfavnkmusha|gohovfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohovfavnkyasha|gohovfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
